narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: burning fossil fuels on an international flight rather than attending remotely and attending to pressing issues at home.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: though L.A.’s infrastructure is not widely considered “high-quality.” A proposed high-speed rail between L.A. and San Francisco has been largely canceled, and current passenger rail service from L.A. to San Diego has been suspended because of a potential landslide hazard.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement challenges the competence and credibility of the local government (an authority) by pointing out the gap between its presentation at an international summit and the perceived poor state of its actual infrastructure projects.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: White Garcetti was away, Los Angeles continued to struggle with the high crime and homelessness that have come to define his legacy, as well as a crisis in the City Council triggered by racist comments from City Council members within Garcetti’s party.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the climate movement's priorities by juxtaposing the mayor's international climate summit attendance with severe, ongoing domestic crises, implying the movement and its actors are out of touch with more immediate local problems.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: though L.A.’s infrastructure is not widely considered “high-quality.” A proposed high-speed rail between L.A. and San Francisco has been largely canceled, and current passenger rail service from L.A. to San Diego has been suspended
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote challenges the competence and credibility of the local government (an authority) by contrasting its participation in a presentation on quality infrastructure with the reported failures and poor state of its own infrastructure projects.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Garcetti’s “Green New Deal” calls for shuttering natural gas plants; it has been opposed by public works unions, and lost the only serious electoral challenge it faced in a 2019 city council race.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement challenges the impact and political viability of a specific climate policy initiative (the Green New Deal), highlighting opposition and electoral failure, which serves to criticize the broader climate movement's proposals and effectiveness.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Garcetti’s “Green New Deal” calls for shuttering natural gas plants; it has been opposed by public works unions
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The quote introduces skepticism and opposition (from unions) to a specific green policy of transitioning away from natural gas, framing it as a controversial action with detractors.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: That is one-fourth (economy) or one-half (premium) the global average per capita use of carbon per year.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: By quantifying the flight's emissions as a fraction of an annual average, the text minimizes the significance of the individual action's contribution to climate change, suggesting the concern over the flight is overstated.
